items.title: Indian Railways Approves ₹398.36 Crore Optical Fibre Cable Backbone Project for Ahmedabad and Ratlam Divisions
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Railways Indian Railways Approves ₹398.36 Crore Optical Fibre Cable Backbone Project for Ahmedabad and Ratlam Divisions Project to Enhance Digital Connectivity and Support Kavach Implementation 1929 RKm Optical Fibre Network to Strengthen Communication Infrastructure in Western Railway Including 1456 RKm in Ahmedabad Division and 473 RKm in Ratlam Division Pos…
